brief.description: Source brief for copy generation. sellingPoints[] is required (non-empty).

placements.description: Placement ids (e.g. 'meta-feed', 'google-search'). One per platform-placement pair you want adapted copy for.

variantCount.description: Number of copy variants to generate. Defaults to 3; clamped to [1, 10].

tone.description: Override tone for this generation. Falls back to brief.tone, then 'professional'.

angle.description: If supplied, all variants use this angle. Otherwise the prompt asks for one angle per variant (from brief.angles when available).

additionalInstructions.description: Optional free-form prompt addendum forwarded to the AI.

placementTextLimits.description: Map of placement id → text-length limits. When supplied, each variant's platformAdaptations[] truncates fields to the per-placement maxes. Resolve upstream from vendor.myndhyve.ads-platforms (specSet.specs[].textLimits) or a host.adPlatformSpecs capability.
